summary:
Lint complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Pass 1 — Structural Integrity
- **All 117 content pages verified**: 6 topics, 19 sources, 3 timelines, 68 entities, 21 ideas
- Index matches disk exactly — no missing or unlisted files
- All 803 wikilinks resolve correctly (broken links only in WIKI.md templates and log.md historical records)
- Zero orphan pages
- Zero companies or people in entities/

## Pass 2 — Wrong & Duplicate Information
**Content fixes:**
- **`timelines/2026-03.md`**: Removed bare wikilinks (now annotated in narrative); fixed "Gemini 3.1 Flash Live" → "Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS"
- **`entities/gpt-5.5.md`**: Added ARC-AGI-3 0.43%, Pentagon deployment, Cyber restrictions, Symphony connections
- **`entities/mimo-v2-pro.md`**: Updated Opus 4.6 reference to note Opus 4.7 supersession
- **`entities/muse-spark.md`**: Enhanced significance with workforce restructuring context

**Date bumps** (verified current, no content changes needed): 10 entity/source pages updated from April to May 2026

## Pass 3 — Connection Quality
- Rewrote 4 bare wikilinks in `timelines/2026-03.md` as annotated narrative
- Enhanced thin connections in `mimo-v2-pro.md`, `muse-spark.md`, `xai.md` (now links to 5 pages vs 2)
- Updated 3 idea pages with May context: `safety-restricted-releases`, `ai-governance-urgency`, `agent-economics`
- All 6 topic pages confirmed: `## Evolution` and `## Patterns & Insights` present
- Zero bare "Related:" or "See also:" patterns in content pages

## Pass 4 — Index & Log
- `index.md`: Updated to 2026-05-04 with accurate counts (unchanged: 6/19/3/68/21)
- `log.md`: Appended detailed lint entry
